hero.subtitle: Monitor your health data in real-time with Next Health Band and sync with the Next Plus Health app.

features.title: All Your Health Data
features.subtitle: On Your Wrist
features.description: Next Health Band measures your daily health metrics with precision sensors and transfers them to the Next Plus Health app.
features.fitnessDesc: Tracks steps, calories, and daily workouts.
features.sleepDesc: Analyzes sleep quality and REM cycles.
features.displayDesc: Large AMOLED screen with vibrant colors.

appIntegration.title: Works Seamlessly with
appIntegration.description: All data from Next Health Band syncs with the Next Plus Health mobile app. Instant access to health experts, personalized recommendations and more.
appIntegration.feature1Desc: Band data is instantly transferred to the app.
appIntegration.feature2Desc: Connect directly with Next Plus Health experts.
appIntegration.feature3Desc: Customized goals based on your data.

whyBand.subtitle: Designed to take your health seriously
whyBand.realtimeDesc: View all your health metrics instantly.
whyBand.syncDesc: Connect to Next Plus Health with one tap.
whyBand.batteryDesc: Up to 14 days of continuous use.
whyBand.waterproofDesc: 5ATM water resistance, wear it while swimming.
